mechanism: The deficit sustains corporate profits via Kalecki identity, compressing default rates and credit spreads, while simultaneously accumulating the debt that creates fiscal tail risk. The same fiscal flow that narrows carry also widens the tail distribution, producing the structurally negative convexity.
regime_dependence: Operative when deficit exceeds ~4% GDP at full employment; strengthens as debt/GDP rises above 100%. The trap deepens as the deficit grows because both carry compression and tail risk accumulation intensify.
